_meta.purpose: ELO regression-gate baseline. CI fails if any entrant drops > tolerance vs these ratings.
_meta.created_round: Round 24 (R24 3-judge ensemble re-judge; opus-default + gpt-5.2/5.4@long/5.4-mini added)
_meta.update_policy: Maintainers may regenerate the baseline with `python3 scripts/elo/check_regression.py --refresh` after intentional changes.
